item.title: On this day in 2003, American activist Rachel Corrie was brutally murdered by Israelis while trying to defend a Palestinian home from demolition. They killed her by driving a bulldozer over her and the home she was defending
item.description: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Rachel_Corrie "Still wearing her fluorescent jacket, she sat down at least 15 meters in front of the bulldozer, and began waving her arms and shouting, just as activists had successfully done dozens of times that day. The bulldozer continued driving forward headed straight for Rachel. When it got so close that it was moving the earth beneath her, she climbed onto the pile of rubble being pushed by the bulldozer. She got so high onto it that she was at eye-level with the cab of the bulldozer. Her head and upper torso were above the bulldozer’s blade, and the bulldozer driver and co-operator could clearly see her. Despite this, he continued forward, which pulled her legs into the pile of rubble, and pulled her down out of view of the driver. If he'd stopped at this point, he may have only broken her legs, but he continued forward, which pulled her underneath the bulldozer. We ran towards him, and waved our arms and shouted, one activist with a megaphone. But the bulldozer driver continued forward, until Rachel was underneath the cab of the bulldozer." -Joe Carr, fellow activist You don't hate Israel enough.
item.dc:creator: Freyja33

item.title: Christian Bale's $22M foster care village just outside LA in Palmdale is almost complete. With 11 residential buildings already up and completion expected later this year.
item.description: The project, developed by Bale’s nonprofit Together California alongside Dr. Eric Esrailian, is designed to keep siblings in foster care from being separated, pairing them with full-time, professionally trained foster parents in a purpose-built community. The village will also include a 7,000-square-foot community center, enrichment programs and green space, temporary housing for birth parents and transitional apartments for teens aging out of care. LA County has more children in foster care than anywhere in the U.S. Bale says this is the work he’ll be most proud of when he looks back on his life.
item.dc:creator: kenistod

item.title: Dump with no particular subject but mostly funny. Have fun, Enjoy and Share !
item.description:
i dont see whats childish about it.
All Of The Mattress People Are Needed.
Speed is relative...
My Steven Hawking People Need Me...
Never in a million years would I have guessed how this was going to play out.
Do not feed the monkeys !
Doordashed flowers to a funeral.
Elephants.
Emotional damage.
Everything reminds me of her.
Giant Penis shaped iceberg near Dildo, Canada.
Interesting.
I thought you’d only see this in cartoons.
I was an Atheist until I saw this.
Looks pretty cool honestly.
Lowkey mad at 10-year-old me for never figuring this out.
People say act normal in public, but us:
Read it twice, just to be 100% sure...
This guy operates the subway.
We must go, our vibrator people need us.
To my gym bros.
What the hell is this ?
What sport is this ? Look at these athletes !

item.title: PTGDump: Video Game Memes (Some Spicy!) Some More
item.description:
Hello everyone! Have a nice frosted Daisy for RHM. I know they gave her brown/auburn hair again, but she's always a redhead in my heart.
This method is very high-risk, high-reward.
I dunno. I've had some pretty out there "here me outs" over the years.
They should just make "The Legend of Zelda: Femboy Hyrule" and get it over with.
My goodness gracious!
In a Prius, no less.
I guess just pretend it's Wednesday today.
I like this attitude.
Cross-post from my Fitness Meme folder. (Wise fwom your gwave)
*Lifts pants8 *Unceasing horrors flow out*
Depends on the combat, really.
Who's up splatting their King Hippo?
Actually, don't do this. This is gross.
... unlimited cheese, you say?
Everyone must enjoy this modern Rice
Why hello again, Subnautica!
I know there's a lot of love for short-stack Midna. But I'm definitely a Real Midna kind of fella.
Edit: Flip Witch: Forbidden Sex Hex was fun. But if there's actually a game called Pussy Dungeon, then sign me up immediately.
Just another day at the office.
Add to this: mobile game ads where people are reading a script over the pre-recorded footage and pretending like they're playing.
FP Edit: Appreciate your eyeballs, y'all. Who are some of your "Hear Me Outs"? Thanks for reading everyone! Swing by my games channel to give me a piece of your mind. www.youtube.com@PTGDad Got a channel of your own? Give me a holler and I'll feature you in an upcoming dump! My channel is growing, and I want to take as many content creators along with me as I can. Rising tides raise all ships, and all.
item.dc:creator: PartTimeGamerDad

item.title: Second funniest monolog joke of the 2026 Oscars
item.description: The funniest joke was " not since 2012 there are no British actors up for best actor or actress. A British spokesperson said, " that's okay, at least we arrest our pedophiles. " "

item.dc:creator: rockyandchloe

item.title: My Immortal
item.description: For some reason, I always thought kidney disease could be cured. I was wrong. A year ago I was diagnosed with stage 2 kidney disease. I wasn't told by the doctor that it wasn't curable. I thought, well if I change all of my habits, It can heal it's self, right? I put off going back to the doctor for further check up because of family and financial reasons. Last week I finally went back in for a checkup. It's gotten worse. I'm really close to stage 3 kidney disease. So now I have to change my lifestyle again. In a panic, I googled what I could do to slow the process. I'm 54 and have been smoking since I was 16. I quit smoking 2 days ago. I'm doing everything I possibly can to slow this even more. I'm currently trying to get a referral from my doctor for a nephrologist. I was told if I give up and let things run it's course, I might live to 60. If I fight like hell, I might live to 70. I was really hoping for one last shot at falling in love and spending my final years with someone. It looks like that is a no go because who in their right mind would want to fall in love with someone knowing that they may only have a few years to spend with that person. Thank you if you read this. I needed to tell someone.
item.dc:creator: TheDiscoVampire

item.title: In recent years, I have been working on a mapmaking tool in my spare time
item.dc:creator: mightofmerchants

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1641 (Martian jazz)
item.description:
Beginning to see a lot more negative comments lately. Someone actually told me to go kill myself last week. Come kill me yourself, coward. Anyway. Bread or whatever. Don't really care anymore.
Frankly, I'd absolutely love to die. Im tired of existing and waiting for the future climate change disaster the boomers have consigned me and my friends to die in, and would like to die beforehand. Either by murder or in my sleep. But I don't feel terribly motivated to do it myself.
Fuck figs. Wasp created bullshit fruit who's flavor is too subtle to show up in a goddamn mead.
No no, Mulder is basically right.
Someone also bitched at me for posting anti Orange One memes but no memes about the Iran war or from the POV of the Iranian people. 1. My dude, if I had some, I would. 2. I sadly cannot read Farsi, and on top of that, my understanding is that the internet has been out within Iran until yesterday anyway. 3. I age all my memes in barrel at LEAST two weeks before I post them, to see if they hold up, with small exceptions. 4. I believe virtue signaling is pointless if and when actual things are able to be done, and i try to do those actual things instead. 5. It's. ? A. ? Fucking. ? Meme. ? Dump. ?
There are honestly times it does feel like I do this while leading tours.
This guy was mentioned in an episode of the British History Podcast!
Im sure someone will say it's AI though.
Pippin is, like, secretary of Bite Club, at a minimum.
Internet Orthobros make me ashamed of my faith. Not of my belief in Christ, but of my co-religionists who are being absolute pricks.
Posted this one before, but fuck it. It's almost as good a reason as it would be if One of the Two Powerful Idiots dies. I had hopes for yesterday that were naturally dashed. Nobody celebrates the Ides of March properly anymore.
Fuck Objectivism
These birds are called Terns.
Mood. I am now okay with never having kids. And since it is highly unlikely that I will be stable enough for relationships ever again anyway... it doesn't matter.
I wonder if there's an equivalent word for "haphazard and completely batshit plans at the last minute" because boy howdy is that the current political shitshow.
If I could enjoy it. My car is throwing a knock engine sensor that is keeping it from accelerating properly so I'm going up to get it checked today and I am terrified at how much this shit will cost me when I almost am back on my feet.
I am trying. This is why I'm going to said car dealership for the appointment in wizard robes and with Pippin.
Pippin tax (and Baja cameo) Today's message from Pippin: "Good morning Pippin. I'm sorry Pippin. [Conure gibberish]" ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Dumpty trumpty
item.dc:creator: KatLuvr54

item.title: How in the hell do Republicans continue to stand behind this filth?
item.description:
https://www.washingtonpost.com/politics/2026/03/16/trump-neal-dunn-terminal-illness/
This is wild. It feels low, even for Trump. And that's saying A LOT. Dude just told the whole world this congressman is dying. This might be how friends and family find out. I've given up hope that Republicans, whether it's voters or elected officials, will ever break away from this disgusting individual, but I still can't help but wonder why when something like this happens.
item.dc:creator: Illinifan88

item.title: Monday Dump Of MORALLY Dubious Memes #491
item.description:
1. Helping the kid out of the snow, so caring
2. YAP
3. This is wild, sound ON
4. So did we, are we the aliens?
5
6. "We're far enough, don't worry about it"
7. Laugh at your own peril
8
9. How to solve starvation
10. This might mess your eyes
11. You did not expect this ending
12
13
14. Who else does this?
15. Thank you if you made it to the end of the dump! You can skip the last post, but if you are still here I just wanted to share that I'm making an indie psychological thriller/moral choice simulator game called The Milgram Experiment! You can check it on Steam and if you like my dump and want to encourage me to finish it, please wishlist: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2719670/The_Milgram_Experiment
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: But wait, there’s more!
item.description: It looks like wealth inequality declines among seniors, but this is partly due to the early deaths of the poorest people. “While wealth inequality narrows after 65 across the U.S. and Europe, in the U.S. it narrows because the poorest Americans die sooner and in greater proportion,” Papanicolas said. Sauce: https://www.powershealth.org/about-us/newsroom/health-library/2025/04/03/even-wealthy-americans-die-younger-than-europeans
item.dc:creator: RipThemUpRatchet
